capacity: A model can select bounded interventions and propose a typed map between two generated finite dynamical representations; an exact OSMM C5-bound verifier accepts or refuses the scoped proposal.
authority_boundary: Learned policies propose. The exact finite simulator and OSMM C5 transport binding decide scoped acceptance. No model output performs a canonical Ledger write.
claim_boundary: The release measures formal/synthetic active bridge identification. Transfer to empirical world models and universal physical realization remain OPEN.

known_external_test_state.broader_osmm_suites: Existing WORLD_DRIFT and AFCC source-hash drift failures remain outside this product change.
